opinion.h4: SHAW v. GARRISON ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE EASTERN DISTRICT OF LOUISIANA. No. 579. Decided December 9, 1968.
opinion.p: Eberhard P. Deutsch and Rene H. Himel, Jr., for appellees.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
THE CHIEF JUSTICE took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
393 U.S. 220 LANDRY ET AL. v. BOYLE, CHIEF JUDGE, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE NORTHERN DISTRICT OF ILLINOIS. No. 659. Decided December 9, 1968.
Robert L. Tucker, R. Eugene Pincham, Jean F. Williams, Leonard Karlin, William M. Kunstler, and Arthur Kinoy for appellants.
The appeal is dismissed for failure to comply with Rule 13 (1).
